purpose: Seed prompt/crate memory for DJ VANTA dual-deck planning without calling paid music, image, or realtime providers.

notes: Prompt packs are local planning hints only.
Generated artifacts remain mock/dry-run unless a human explicitly enables a backend lane.

entries.name: PNW Warehouse Warmup
prompt_stack: foggy PNW warehouse warmup, clean 16-bar intro, rubbery sub restrained, brushed hats, room-tone ghosts
DJ-friendly outro tail, no muddy master, leave space for a text-first VANTA check-in
entries.lineage_note: Respect to warehouse and sound-system culture; keep care visible before the room peaks.

entries.name: Intergalactic Bass Handoff
prompt_stack: intergalactic bass handoff, sidechained bass, metallic percussion, phrase-locked 32-bar transition
make Deck B feel like a portal opening under Deck A, clean bass swap at bar 17
entries.lineage_note: This is a handoff, not replacement: human selectors taught the machine the grammar.

entries.name: Rave Survival Cooldown
prompt_stack: rave survival cooldown, warm pads, soft breakbeat, lower visual intensity, room reset without killing the vibe
leave a 10-second intro bed for hydration, chill-zone, exits, and buddy-check reminder
entries.lineage_note: Care infrastructure is part of responsible dance culture, not an interruption.

entries.name: VANTA Peak Transmission
prompt_stack: peak-time DJ VANTA transmission, rave stabs, tight kick, code-rain hook, readable call-and-response motif
keep intro/outro mixable and reserve midrange space for a short MC tag
entries.lineage_note: AI is a guest at peak time; the room and the humans stay in charge.

entries.name: Afterglow Lineage Card
prompt_stack: afterglow closer with disco echo, slow neon pads, gentle kick, reflective culture cue
make space for a respectful lineage talk-break and final human check-out
entries.lineage_note: Respect the communities that made room for the weird kids and future sounds.
